positive: Minimalist celestial body composition. A stylized, neon-glow depiction of a cosmic wave or nebula unfolding across a dark, velvety backdrop. The wave should feature bioluminescent turquoise and electric magenta tones, contrasting sharply against deep space blacks and indigo gradients. Include subtle, abstract geometric constellations and tiny scattered star particles to give depth. The overall mood is dreamy, energetic, and harmonious. Design must maintain strong lines and clean negative space, perfectly centered for high contrast apparel printing, vector art style, highly detailed, 4k resolution.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, trademark, dirty, grain, artifacts, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, random elements, realism, photorealism
